guides.title: Guides
guides.metaDesc: All Kingshot event, PvE, PvP, and gear guides in one place.

tips.title: Tips
tips.li2: If F2P, always prioritize joining the strongest rally in your alliance

overview.title: Event Overview
overview.body: Bear Hunt is an alliance event available every 48 hours, where you can obtain Forge Hammers.

heroes.title: Hero Setup
heroes.li1: Rally Leader: assign your strongest rally hero
heroes.li2: Rally Members: prioritize heroes whose first expedition skill buffs attack or damage

mode.title: Solo vs Rally Participation
mode.li2: Join 6 rallies led by top alliance members
mode.li3: Total of 7 rallies is the key to high Bear Hunt scores

meta.title: Lost Ruins Quick Guide | KingshotData KR
meta.desc: 30-minute Lost Ruins: maximize Bronze Ore, capture veins/clear guards, 7-minute palace entry, R-R-L-L-R skill build, and 20/15/10/5 timing.
meta.author: KingshotData Community Guide

ruins.intro: Solo content (bi-weekly, 30 minutes). Goal is to maximize Bronze Ore. Capture veins, clear guards, time unstable veins, decide on palace entry, and rotate skills to consistently place high.

cheat.pri: Whales: Lv3 vein + guards + palace / F2P: Lv1–2 six-gather routine

s0.title: Basic Info
s0.l1: Solo content, bi-weekly / 30 minutes, you can choose your time
s0.l2: Goal: maximize Bronze Ore → core resource for Lord Gem growth
s0.l3: Veins (Lv1–3): higher level = more ore / tougher guards → challenge within your power
s0.l4: Captured veins drop Bronze Ore (hand icon): anyone can pick up → instant gain

s1.title: Basic Strategy
s1.l1: Strong players: focus on Lv3 veins → kill guards often for skill EXP
s1.l2: Weaker players: run Lv2 vein six-gather routine (steady points)
s1.l3: Cesare guards: killing = skill EXP, losing = hero unusable for 5 minutes
s1.tip: During first 3 minutes, scout areas with Lv2–3 veins + guards, then teleport to secure the best spot.

s2.title: Palace Strategy
s2.l1: Strong players: prepare to enter palace at 7 minutes left
s2.l2: With 3–4 × 50% march boosts, you’ll arrive with ~2s left (map/distance may vary)
s2.l3: Weaker players: avoid palace fights, focus on veins → steady points

s3.title: Skill Build & Timing
s3.lv1: Lv1 (R): Extra Bronze Ore when killing guards
s3.lv3: Lv3 (L): Extra Bronze Ore when capturing (1m cooldown)
s3.key: Just hitting the 15-minute timing is enough to place 1st → avoid cooldown waste
s3.goal: Goal: reach Lv5 by 20 minutes left (farm guards for EXP)

s4.title: Unstable Vein Timing
s4.l2: Spawn times: 20/19/18 min and 10/9/8 min marks
s4.l3: When alert pops, send all troops, pick up hand drop instantly

s5.title: Key Tips
s5.l1: Optimize loop: veins → guards → pick-ups in circular path
s5.l2: Risk management: avoid weak heroes fighting guards, focus on gathering/picking
s5.l3: Avoid hot zones: immediately switch to adjacent veins
s5.warn: Losing = hero unusable for 5 minutes → don’t risk key comps

s6.title: Summary
s6.sum1: Strong: Lv3 vein + guards + 7min palace entry
s6.sum2: Weaker: Lv2 vein six-gather + guard focus
s6.sum4: Clear Cesare guards → hit skill Lv5 fast
s6.sum5: Just memorize R-R-L-L-R to place high
